first_paragraph: ***The Laureate*** is a 2021 biographical [romantic drama](/wiki/Romantic_drama "Romantic drama") film written and directed by William Nunez. It stars [Tom Hughes](/wiki/Tom_Hughes_(actor) "Tom Hughes (actor)"), [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock"), and [Dianna Agron](/wiki/Dianna_Agron "Dianna Agron"). The film depicts the life of British [war poet](/wiki/War_poet "War poet") and novelist [Robert Graves](/wiki/Robert_Graves "Robert Graves"). The film premiered at the 2021 Mallorca Film Festival.[[2]](#cite_note-2) The film won Film of the Festival at the 2021 Oxford International Film Awards as well as Best Feature, Best Director (William Nunez) and Best Actor (Tom Hughes).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2021 British film

| The Laureate | |

***The Laureate*** is a 2021 biographical [romantic drama](/wiki/Romantic_drama "Romantic drama") film written and directed by William Nunez. It stars [Tom Hughes](/wiki/Tom_Hughes_(actor) "Tom Hughes (actor)"), [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock"), and [Dianna Agron](/wiki/Dianna_Agron "Dianna Agron"). The film depicts the life of British [war poet](/wiki/War_poet "War poet") and novelist [Robert Graves](/wiki/Robert_Graves "Robert Graves"). The film premiered at the 2021 Mallorca Film Festival.[[2]](#cite_note-2) The film won Film of the Festival at the 2021 Oxford International Film Awards as well as Best Feature, Best Director (William Nunez) and Best Actor (Tom Hughes).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Laureate&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Tom Hughes](/wiki/Tom_Hughes_(actor) "Tom Hughes (actor)") as [Robert Graves](/wiki/Robert_Graves "Robert Graves")
* [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock") as [Nancy Nicholson](/wiki/Nancy_Nicholson "Nancy Nicholson")
* [Dianna Agron](/wiki/Dianna_Agron "Dianna Agron") as [Laura Riding](/wiki/Laura_Riding "Laura Riding")
* [Julian Glover](/wiki/Julian_Glover "Julian Glover") as [Alfred Graves](/wiki/Alfred_Perceval_Graves "Alfred Perceval Graves")[[4]](#cite_note-telegraph-4)
* [Patricia Hodge](/wiki/Patricia_Hodge "Patricia Hodge") as Amy Graves[[4]](#cite_note-telegraph-4)
* [Indica Watson](/wiki/Indica_Watson "Indica Watson") as Catherine Nicholson [[5]](#cite_note-5)
* [Christien Anholt](/wiki/Christien_Anholt "Christien Anholt") as [T. S. Eliot](/wiki/T._S._Eliot "T. S. Eliot")[[6]](#cite_note-6)
* [Fra Fee](/wiki/Fra_Fee "Fra Fee") as [Geoffrey Phibbs](/wiki/Geoffrey_Phibbs "Geoffrey Phibbs")[[7]](#cite_note-7)

## Production

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Laureate&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Production")]

In February 2018, [Kathy Bates](/wiki/Kathy_Bates "Kathy Bates") was attached to the production with [Tom Hughes](/wiki/Tom_Hughes_(actor) "Tom Hughes (actor)"), [Dianna Agron](/wiki/Dianna_Agron "Dianna Agron") and [Laura Haddock](/wiki/Laura_Haddock "Laura Haddock") already cast.[[8]](#cite_note-8) [Hayley Atwell](/wiki/Hayley_Atwell "Hayley Atwell") and [Dominic Cooper](/wiki/Dominic_Cooper "Dominic Cooper") were also attached the production, but dropped out due to scheduling conflicts.[[9]](#cite_note-9)
